network_mode.description: Network access policy. [agent] and [verifier] use this only as an explicit phase override when set.

allowed_hosts.description: Hostnames or leading wildcard patterns reachable when network_mode='allowlist'.
allowed_hosts.title: Allowed Hosts

user.description: Username or UID to run the agent as. None uses the environment's default USER (e.g., root).
user.title: User

exclude.description: Patterns to exclude when downloading a directory artifact (passed as tar --exclude flags).
exclude.title: Exclude

service.description: Docker Compose service to collect this artifact from. None or 'main' targets the agent's container. Any other value requires a compose-capable environment provider and an absolute source path.
service.title: Service

Author.description: Author information for a package or dataset.
Author.title: Author

network_mode.description: Network access policy for this environment. Defaults to public.

allowed_hosts.description: Hostnames or leading wildcard patterns reachable when network_mode='allowlist'.
allowed_hosts.title: Allowed Hosts

docker_image.description: A pre-built Docker image to use for the environment. When set, environment/Dockerfile is optional for supported environment types.
docker_image.title: Docker Image

os.description: Target operating system for the task's container. Defaults to 'linux' for back-compat. Set to 'windows' to target Windows containers (requires Docker Desktop in Windows container mode on a Windows host).

gpu_types.description: List of acceptable GPU types (e.g., ['H100', 'A100', 'T4']). None means any GPU type is acceptable.
gpu_types.title: Gpu Types

tpu.description: TPU slice specification (type + topology). When set, the environment requests a TPU node matching this spec.

env.description: Environment variables required for the task and resolved from the host at runtime. Supports ${VAR} and ${VAR:-default} template syntax.
env.title: Env

skills_dir.description: Path to skills directory in the environment. Contents are copied to the agent's skills config directory.
skills_dir.title: Skills Dir

healthcheck.description: Healthcheck to run after environment start to verify readiness. Mirrors Docker HEALTHCHECK semantics.

workdir.description: Default working directory for command execution. Overrides the container's WORKDIR when set.
workdir.title: Workdir

HealthcheckConfig.description:
Healthcheck configuration mirroring Docker HEALTHCHECK options.

Runs a command repeatedly after environment start to verify readiness.
All retries must pass before agent setup begins.

command.description: Shell command to run. Exit 0 means healthy.
command.title: Command

interval_sec.description: Time in seconds between healthcheck attempts.
interval_sec.title: Interval Sec

timeout_sec.description: Maximum time in seconds for a single healthcheck command to run.
timeout_sec.title: Timeout Sec

start_period_sec.description: Grace period in seconds after environment start during which failures do not count toward retries.
start_period_sec.title: Start Period Sec

start_interval_sec.description: Interval in seconds between checks during the start period.
start_interval_sec.title: Start Interval Sec

retries.description: Number of consecutive failures before the healthcheck is considered failed.
retries.title: Retries

HealthcheckConfig.title: HealthcheckConfig

MCPServerConfig.description: Configuration for an MCP server available to the agent.
MCPServerConfig.title: MCPServerConfig

MultiStepRewardStrategy.description: Strategy for deriving a trial-level reward from per-step verifier results.
MultiStepRewardStrategy.title: MultiStepRewardStrategy

NetworkMode.description: Network access policy for agent and verifier execution.
NetworkMode.title: NetworkMode

PackageInfo.description:
Package metadata for the [task] section of task.toml.

This section identifies the package in the registry with a unique name.
PackageInfo.title: PackageInfo

min_reward.description: If set, abort remaining steps when this step's rewards do not meet the threshold(s). A float gates on the 'reward' key (1D convention); a dict gates on each declared key (aborts if any key is below its threshold or missing from the rewards dict). A missing verifier_result (verifier crash) or missing gated key is treated as -inf. Ignored when verification is globally disabled.
min_reward.title: Min Reward

healthcheck.description: Optional per-step healthcheck run after this step's setup completes and before the agent runs. Mirrors the semantics of the top-level environment healthcheck; start_period_sec applies as a grace period after setup. Supplements rather than replaces the top-level healthcheck.

artifacts.description: Artifacts to collect after this step's verification into steps/{name}/artifacts/. Appended to task-level and trial-level artifacts during this step's collection pass.
artifacts.title: Artifacts

TaskOS.description: Target operating system for a task's container.
TaskOS.title: TaskOS

TpuSpec.description:
Specification for a TPU slice attached to an environment.

The (type, topology) pair fully determines the GKE node pool the pod
lands on *and* the per-pod TPU chip count, so there is no separate
user-facing chip-count field — it is derived via chip_count.

type.description: TPU accelerator type. Accepts either a user-friendly alias (e.g., 'v6e', 'trillium', 'v4') or a canonical GKE label (e.g., 'tpu-v6e-slice', 'tpu7x').
type.title: Type

TpuSpec.title: TpuSpec

VerifierCollectConfig.description:
A command run inside a compose service after the agent phase ends.

Collect hooks let services snapshot runtime state (database contents,
in-memory counters) into files before the environment is torn down, so
the files can be declared as artifacts and read by a separate verifier.
Hooks targeting the main service run before the main container is
stopped; hooks targeting sidecars run after it is stopped.

command.description: Shell command to run in the service.
command.title: Command

service.description: Compose service to run the command in. Defaults to main.
service.title: Service

timeout_sec.description: Timeout in seconds for the collect command.
timeout_sec.title: Timeout Sec

user.description: Username or UID to run the command as. None uses the service container's default user.
user.title: User

VerifierCollectConfig.title: VerifierCollectConfig

network_mode.description: Network access policy. [agent] and [verifier] use this only as an explicit phase override when set.

allowed_hosts.description: Hostnames or leading wildcard patterns reachable when network_mode='allowlist'.
allowed_hosts.title: Allowed Hosts

user.description: Username or UID to run the verifier as. None uses the environment's default USER (e.g., root).
user.title: User

environment_mode.description: Whether the verifier runs in the agent's environment ('shared') or in a dedicated container ('separate'). When omitted: defaults to 'separate' if a verifier 'environment' is set, otherwise 'shared'.

environment.description: Environment definition for the separate verifier container. Same schema as the top-level [environment] section. When set without an explicit environment_mode, implies environment_mode='separate'. When unset with environment_mode='separate', a fresh copy of the top-level [environment] is used. Conflicts with environment_mode='shared'.

collect.description: Commands run in compose services after the agent phase ends and before artifact collection ([[verifier.collect]] blocks in task.toml). Use these to snapshot runtime state into files that artifact entries can then collect.
collect.title: Collect

VerifierEnvironmentMode.description: Whether the verifier runs in the agent's environment or its own.
VerifierEnvironmentMode.title: VerifierEnvironmentMode

task.description: Package information for the task, parsed from the [task] section of task.toml.

multi_step_reward_strategy.description: How to derive the trial-level reward from per-step verifier results in a multi-step task. 'mean' computes per-key means across steps (missing keys treated as 0; steps without a verifier_result excluded). 'final' uses the last step's verifier_result verbatim. Only applies to multi-step tasks; leave unset for single-step tasks. Defaults to 'mean' when unset on a multi-step task.

title: TaskConfig
$comment: Generated locally from harbor.models.task.config.TaskConfig in Harbor 0.17.0.
